programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In their first individual challenge, the chefs must create dishes that look as good as they taste. The winner's dish will appear in a food magazine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Each chef can only spend ten dollars on ingredients for their next meal. A jury of gourmands tastes the dishes and estimates how much they would pay for them.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The four chefs must teach bachelors with no cooking experience how to prepare monkfish. The winner and a chosen guest get to ride on a Goodyear blimp.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The last four chefs taste dishes at the Savoy Grill, then must recreate one. The winner spends time with their family on a yacht while the losers clean the dormitories.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In the season finale, the final two chefs travel to the London West Hollywood to be judged by five of Gordon Ramsay's top chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In the season premiere, 16 chefs vie for position of head chef at the luxurious L.A. Market. The contestants meet the new maître d' and prepare signature dishes for Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay brings in world-renowned chef Masaharu Morimoto for a demonstration, then challenges the aspiring chefs to recreate his dish to exacting standards.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The thirteen contestants must prepare breakfast for fifty hungry EMTs. The winning team enjoy a poolside lunch and a trip to trapeze school while the losers are on cleaning duty.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay challenges the aspiring chefs to create their own ravioli dishes using ingredients of their choice, then asks both teams to rank their dishes from one to six.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Hell's Kitchen hosts the Beverly Hills High School prom with a theme of "Old Hollywood." The teams must prepare a menu of one appetizer and two entrees.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: To shake things up, Chef Ramsay swaps out members from both teams. For the episode's challenge, each chef must create a unique salad. The team with the most-favored salad wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The contestants must name the ingredients that are labelled on a spinning roulette wheel. Chef Ramsay then asks them to prepare dishes using the ingredients that they named.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams must shop on a budget and prepare elegant dishes for four judges. The winners go sailing and dancing while the losers fumigate Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay tests the contestants' palates by having them taste fast food items disguised as five-star hotel cuisine. He then challenges them to a blind taste test.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: El espíritu de un jugador de hockey fallecido es liberado en un viejo asiento de estadio y se apodera de la familia de Jacobo.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Un nuevo periódico se convierte en un éxito repentino en Montreal, pero Jacob sospecha algo.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: El abuelo de Jacob viene de visita y eso significa que es hora de uno de los desayuno-almuerzos domingueros especiales de papá.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Cuando Jacobo accidentalmente rompe el disco favorito de su hermano Daniel, desea poder vivir nuevamente ese momento fatídico.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia se ven forzados a interrumpir su entrenamiento cuando Robotnik amenaza al oráculo y toma prisionero a un miembro de la resistencia.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik está construyendo una represa en el sur y nadie lo detiene porque los defensores de la libertad de las montañas y los del valle están enemistados. La reina Aleena manda a los Hedgehogs para que los defensores se amiguen y unan fuerzas.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik está utilizando a una estilista robótica para reunir información sobre qué ciudadanos están en su contra. Sin saberlo, Sonia va a hacerse peinar el cabello y da demasiada información.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Un científico autoproclamado llega a Robotrópolis con un dispositivo llamado 'desrobotizador' capaz de revertir los efectos del robotizador de Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Robotnik organiza una muestra en donde exhibe las copas reales de la familia Hedgehog, y Sonic, Manic y Sonia van al museo para recuperar sus reliquias familiares.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Mientras Phoebe compite en un concurso de canto por TV, el Sr. Gato intenta hackear las máquinas. El Sr. Gato recupera el cohete de Coop, que es un éxito en el club de modelismo, para acceder al observatorio y destruir un satélite que bloquea sus señales.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Millie trae a casa un gato extraño y sin pelo, y Coop descubre que su vida, que era feliz, nunca volverá a ser la misma. Coop desafía a su papá cuando se queda despierto viendo una película de terror y descubre que su casa fue invadida por gatos zombis.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: La Sra. Munson dicta la ley: Coop no debe poner un pie en su patio. Sr. Gato termina con un collar hecho para controlar sus exigentes maullidos.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop y Dennis construyen un fuerte en un árbol para tener algo de tiempo libre de Sr. Gato y de su hermanita. Millie vende un número récord de galletas Greenie Girl pero las cajas siguen desapareciendo y todos los dedos apuntan a Coop.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Después de que Sr. Gato se entera de que le tomaron radiografías en la primera ida al veterinario, se escabulle para destruirlas. El nuevo helicóptero de rescate controlado por radio de Coop le trae recuerdos a su papá de su juguete preferido.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop está muy resfriado y tiene que quedarse a solas en casa con Sr. Gato sin ir a la escuela. Coop y Dennis realizan un espectáculo de magia y hacen desaparecer a Sr. Gato.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El nuevo ratón a cuerda de Sr. Gato tiene un efecto hipnótico sobre los demás gatos del vecindario. Coop convence a su papá de que es alérgico a Sr. Gato para que él se deshaga del molesto felino para siempre.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Cuando Coop y Sr. Gato se pegan la mano y la pata, se ven obligados a pasar el día juntos. Coop y Sr. Gato descubren que el premio por ganar la exposición de gatos del vecindario es una provisión anual de Fishy Frisky de pescado.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacob está harto de compartir una habitación con su hermano Noah.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Es el primer día en una escuela nueva y Jacob quiere verse 'en onda'.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobs papá le regala una tarjeta del jugador de hockey Gummer Gormley.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: En un intento de reducir costos, el Director Tragón ha reemplazado a la cocinera de la escuela por Leo Piojoso, el conserje.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Un nuevo periódico se convierte en un éxito repentino en Montreal, pero Jacob sospecha algo.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Papá se entera de que tal vez publiquen un poema de él. Fanny se convierte en la entrenadora personal de su papá.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Fanny le pide a Danny su disfraz de lagarto. Marcos la Morsa cuenta una increíble historia de más.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Fanny y sus animales atienden a las niñas populares. Papá tiene que ir a trabajar un sábado.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Inky, Blinky y Bob transforman el ático en un paraíso invernal. Sara se pone demasiado mandona, y Kara y Lara deciden que prefieren jugar con Fanny.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic y Sonia se infiltran en la guarida de Robotnik para recuperar el libro 'Erizos despeinados'. El libro contiene información valiosa sobre la familia real que podría guiar a Robotnik hasta el escondite de la reina Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Durante una visita a una prisión en busca de registros de su madre, los Hedgehogs se encuentran con un prisionero que lleva una máscara de hierro y dice ser pariente de ellos.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: El oráculo les da una misión a los Hedgehogs para que puedan encontrar respuestas sobre el futuro: los lleva a una dimensión extraña donde Robotnik es bueno y ellos son los malos.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Nothing goes right for Chester when he tries to earn extra money to keep his crooked Uncle Sunday Meachem out of Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A crafty journalist bets that a greenhorn can pose as a hardened gunman in Dodge City for two weeks and not get killed.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: War hero Kip Marston asks Army Col. Gabe Wilson to look up his son, but he is totally unprepared for what Wilson finds.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Louie Pheeters, the town barfly, witnesses a murder and tells the killer about it, thereby becoming the target of a deadly plot.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Half-breed Quint Asper's bravery causes a haughty Army colonel's daughter to change her attitude toward Indians.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An untamed nature girl develops a liking for Marshal Matt Dillon and isn't shy about expressing it.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The son of a killer seems set on proving that he is worse than his badman lather until he meets a convent-bred girl.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An ex-convict named Chance, who was reared with Matt Dillon, renews their boyhood rivalry when he comes to Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When Kitty and Quint Asper befriend Shona, an ailing Indian woman, they find themselves the targets of a vicious racist boycott.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kindly Ben Galt turns into a murderous troublemaker after he suffers a blow on the head. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A cowhand accused of murder assists Marshal Dillon when the latter's eyesight is impaired in an attack by three desperadoes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Quint Asper, framed as a horse thief by two bad men, angrily leaves town after being beaten up by several Dodge City residents. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When two outlaws fail in their efforts to kill Marshal Dillon, a meek little man volunteers to do the job for $200. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: To quell a feud between two old friends, Matt Dillon gets a court ruling that each is to be responsible for the other's life. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered for Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables work to solve the mystery behind an undeliverable Christmas card.

programme.title: Sound of Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A music teacher is hired by a widower to give lessons to his daughters.

programme.title: Calm at Sunset
programme.desc: A young man leaves college to follow family tradition and become a deep sea fisherman. Stars Michael Moriarty, Kate Nelligan, Peter Facinelli and Gretchen Mol. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: November Christmas
programme.desc: With the support of his small town, a father's wish for his very sick daughter is realized. Stars Sam Elliott, John Corbett, and Sarah Paulson. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Blind Spot
programme.desc: A woman running for the Senate is jolted by a family tragedy which threatens to become a career ending scandal. Stars Joanne Woodward and Laura Linney. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: A Family Reunion
programme.desc: In their youth, the Banner siblings made it big as a rock group, but at the height of their fame, the group fell apart. Now, fifteen years later the siblings reunite in their hometown to take care of their mother.

programme.title: A Painted House
programme.desc: 10-year-old Luke had never kept a secret or told a lie. But when two groups of migrant workers-and two dangerous men-come to work the family's Arkansas cotton farm, mysteries suddenly flood Luke's world.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered for Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables work to solve the mystery behind an undeliverable Christmas card.

programme.title: Sound of Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A music teacher is hired by a widower to give lessons to his daughters.

programme.title: November Christmas
programme.desc: With the support of his small town, a father's wish for his very sick daughter is realized. Stars Sam Elliott, John Corbett, and Sarah Paulson. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Once Upon a Winter's Date
programme.desc: Katherine, a workaholic executive, endures the worst Valentine's Day date of her life. On her walk home, a gypsy weaves a magical spell on her and when she wakes up the next morning, she realizes it's Valentine's Day again.

programme.title: Broadcasting Christmas
programme.desc: Two exes compete for the same co-host position at the nation's favorite morning show in Manhattan. They'll both do what it takes to get ahead, but the fire that burned between them hasn't quite burned out.

programme.title: Christmas Festival of Ice
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma sets out to save her town's beloved ice sculpture contest.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Belinda and her ex are forced to team up for the towns Christmas Scavenger Hunt.

programme.title: Lucky Christmas
programme.desc: Holly Ceroni is devastated when she learns her winning lottery ticket is in her stolen car. But what happens when the man behind it falls for Holly? Stars Elizabeth Berkley and Jason Gray-Stanford.

programme.title: Navidad encantada
programme.desc: Laura Trudeau era una gran bailarina. Como jefa de proyecto de diseño de interiores, le encargan la renovación de un albergue en su ciudad natal para Nochebuena. Se queda atónita al ver que se trata del lugar donde ella y su ex pareja se presentaban.

programme.title: Navidad a la medida
programme.desc: Steven recluta a Gretchen, una coordinadora de vacaciones, para llevar la alegría navideña a su familia. Ninguno esperaba que el espíritu navideño los acercara más. Protagonizada por Alexa PenaVega y Jonathan Bennett.

programme.title: Navidad en Homestead
programme.desc: La vida da un vuelco para el guapo alcalde de Homestead cuando una película de Hollywood viene a grabar en plena temporada navideña. Protagonizan Taylor Cole y Michael Rady.

programme.title: ¡Buenos días, Navidad!
programme.desc: Dos peleadores presentadores de televisión son enviados a un pequeño pueblo festivo en Navidad. Mientras fingen llevarse bien, descubren que hay más entre ellos de lo que pensaban.

programme.title: Vacaciones navideñas
programme.desc: Deseando pasar unas vacaciones relajadas, una escritora de viajes toma unas vacaciones tradicionales de Navidad por primera vez. Por culpa de un problema con el alquiler, se queda varada para las fiestas.

programme.title: Enamorándome de Vermont
programme.desc: La autora del libro más vendido decide escapar de los medios, pero su plan se desmorona cuando queda atrapada en una tormenta, choca el auto y se despierta sin saber quién es.

programme.title: La Navidad más dulce
programme.desc: Una repostera en aprietos deberá adoptar el espíritu navideño o arriesgará perder un concurso y una segunda oportunidad en el amor. Protagonizada por Lacey Chabert and Lea Coco.

programme.title: Navidad en el aire
programme.desc: La coordinadora Lydia conoce a Robert, un inventor de juguetes de Chicago con dos niños pequeños. Cuando le solicitan a su compañía que presente su nueva línea de juguetes navideños en un enorme supermercado en 12 días, Robert necesita la ayuda de Lydia.

programme.title: Romance en rehabilitación
programme.desc: Jenna, una ex bailarina profesional, usa el ballet para ayudar a un jugador de Hockey a volver a las pistas de hielo. Protagonizan Alexa PenaVega y Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Enamorándome de Vermont

programme.title: La Navidad más dulce

programme.title: Navidad en el aire

programme.title: Romance en rehabilitación

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pone fin a la batalla de los sexos y "Hell's Kitchen" abre nuevos caminos cuando los equipos cocinan para un grupo especialmente exigente: los niños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos get settled in their country home after all those years in a New York apartment and immediately begin to miss their old friends, Fred and Ethel. Lucy and Ricky decide to surprise the Mertzes with a visit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to replace their old furniture, Lucy gets an allowance of $500 from Ricky. Lucy goes overboard when she shops with their new neighbor Betty Ramsey, spending over three thousand dollars!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.desc: Magnum and Higgins are sent on a deadly mission inside a high security correctional center when a ruthless criminal abducts Katsumoto and his ex-wife; T.C. rushes to help Rick when Suzy experiences serious pregnancy complications.

programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: LEGO DC Super Heroes: Batman Be-Leaguered
programme.desc: Superman wants Batman to join his new superhero team, but Batman prides himself on being a self-sufficient loner.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Superheroes - Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel’s Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: LEGO Marvel: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers are forced to "party" with Ultron when he seeks to disassemble the team by taking control of Iron Man's armor and enacting a nefarious scheme to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Erica reconnects with Rich and learns he's got a new client she doesn't approve of. Chrissy pressures Chink to have a baby and ends up taking matters into her own hands. Amina goes into labor and receives some confusing news from Peter. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Peter comes clean to Amina about being in Barbados with Tara. Cyn and Rich agree to work together until Erica tries to sabotage their event. Chrissy realizes Chink's unwillingness to get divorced is a deal breaker. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Peter tries to convince Amina it's over between him and Tara. Rich begins work with his new artist, Jhonni Blaze, but lies to Paris about it. Mendeecees tries to patch things up with Samantha, but things turn ugly. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Yandy and Mendeecees continue to have problems with their extended family. Rich's two artists have a memorable first meeting. Cisco tries to get to a good place with his children's mother, Tasha. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Rich tries to get his artists in check, while Diamond uncovers Cisco's hidden conversations with Tasha. Chink ruins a weekend away with Chrissy by giving her bad news. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Peter is furious that Amina snitched on him. Fed up - she takes the baby and leaves to Germany. Mendeecees lies to Yandy that Omere is in the hospital, which sends Yandy into a frenzy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Emotions run high when Erica and Cyn meet one last time. Chink feels betrayed by Chrissy's secret magazine shoot. Rich breaches guy code and goes after his best friend's girl. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Diamond falls hard for Rich, claiming him in front of Jhonni, and in public. Yandy takes matters into her own hands with a certain assistant. Tara encourages Amina to stand her ground with Peter. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Jhonni pours her heart out to Rich only to have it broken. Cisco confesses to Cyn he is falling for her. Chrissy heads to DC and finally meets Chink's family. Yandy receives some grim news about her father. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Jhonni and Rich deal with some unfinished business. Erica tries to help Peter win Amina back. Chrissy gives Chink an ultimatum. Cyn and Cisco discuss their relationship. Yandy decides to take a big step before the baby is born. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Peter presents Amina with a ring, asking her to stay. Chrissy tells Chink to make a final decision on their relationship. Diamond and Cisco come together for one last time. Yandy drops a big surprise on Mendeecees at the baby shower. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Gunplay returns to Miami and vows to avoid temptation, Amara battles colorism as she hunts for a producer, Pretty Ricky's reunion is pretty rock and Bobby Lytes clashes with cousin Trina.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Joy wants closure with almost-ex-husband Trick, Pleasure P reconnects with a former flame, Amara's friends confront Young Hollywood, and Keyara doesn't want Gunplay working with Miami Tip.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Shay and Blue bury the hatchet, though Amara's unimpressed by Young Hollywood's 'apology,' Jojo's feuding parents derail her boutique opening, and Jeffrey rediscovers his love for Malik.

programme.title: Multitudes: The Power of Numbers
programme.desc: A look inside an array of ecosystems to learn why animals congregate in crowds.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: See how plants and animals keep their cool in Africa's most scorching regions.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: A vast island continent of almost 3 million miles, Australia is home to many unusual animals on the planet.

programme.title: Monkey Revolution - Thailand's Diving Macaques
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the lives of these cheeky, clever, water-loving primates.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Wombat
programme.desc: The breeding season brings out wombats' energy, aggression and playfulness.

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
programme.desc: Exploring a range of mystical peaks that runs through the heart of Austria.

programme.title: High Life at Low Temperatures
programme.desc: Trek up the peaks of Austria's Little Siberia for a look at the rhythms of icy alpine life. See where the region's streams begin, observe eagles and ermines feasting on summer's bounty, and marvel at salamanders' birthing cycle below the treeline.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: The sun rises on a day in May and the animals of the American tropics get ready to beat the heat.

programme.title: Primeval New Zealand
programme.desc: Travel back through time in Primeval New Zealand; science reveals the true story about where New Zealand's wildlife icons came from, and the reasons for their unique evolution.

programme.title: Eurasian Lynx: The Queen in the North
programme.desc: The first snowfalls bring harsh conditions where very few animals can survive, but the Eurasian lynx thrives despite the blizzards and subzero temperatures.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Old friends and a breakaway Manzi trio; Kakumbi make a kill.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: The wildlife of Europe's waterways.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Documenting the species of animals and ecosystems of some of the world's most biodiverse locations.

programme.title: Wildest: Latin America
programme.desc: Covering 800,000 square kilometers, Patagonia is the southernmost part of South America. This film follows a year in Patagonia and sees animals survive in unlikely places.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Napoleon's Dictionary
programme.desc: Lupin learns of his grandfather's secret treasure, supposedly hidden in the pages of a dictionary previously owned by Napoleon Bonaparte! Said dictionary just happens to be the prize in a cross-country classic car race.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: From Siberia With Love
programme.desc: Ultimate thief Lupin III has a new target: the lost gold of the Romanov dynasty! With the help of a mysterious blonde named Judy Scott, Lupin discovers the treasure hidden in Texas, at the Bank of Liberty.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Voyage to Danger
programme.desc: Someone sent orders to assassinate Lupin. Will he survive or die trying!?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/27/11: The D-backs allowed five runs in the top of the 10th inning, but after scoring a couple of runs, Ryan Roberts came to the plate and sent the fans to home happy with a walk-off grand slam against the Dodgers.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/01: The Rangers exploded for a nine-run 3rd inning against the Tigers and would go on to win 15-5, clinching the American League pennant in six games.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/6/2012: The Rays rally in the bottom of the 9th inning to walk-off against the Yankees with run-scoring hits by Ben Zobrist and Carlos Pena in a comeback win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Mets' storied franchise had gone 50 years without throwing a no-hitter. After numerous close calls, history was finally made on June 1, 2012 when Johan Santana needed 134 pitches to hold the Cardinals hitless in an 8-0 win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Felix Hernandez had never thrown a no-hitter throughout the first seven years of his career, but on August 14, 2012, the King was perfect for 27 straight outs against the Rays to throw the first perfect game in Mariners history.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K
programme.desc: Watch some in-depth interviews and get an inside look at the movie itself that is classically riffed in this Mystery Science Theater 3000 episode.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Outlaw (of Gor)
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: The Batwoman
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch a scantily-clad Mexican superhero take on a mad scientist and his aquatic super-soldiers in THE BATWOMAN (1968).

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: All three hosts watch a group of precocious orphans attempt save a dying Father Christmas in THE CHRISTMAS DRAGON (2014).

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion Of The Neptune Men
programme.desc: Our heroes discover just how boring an alien attack on Tokyo can be when they view an anti-vehicle for Sonny Chiba.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: An unexpected event brings Watson into contact again with Elana March, the crime boss she brought to justice. Also, with Watson distracted, Holmes enlists Detective Bell to join him in a temporary partnership to solve a theft at a local zoo.

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Historias de fantasmas: El cirujano

programme.title: Historias de fantasmas: Almas gemelas

programme.title: Historias de fantasmas: El monstruo de los ojos verdes

programme.title: Historias de fantasmas: Ya no duermas

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.desc: Tras dar con el paradero de Rosaura, Luis Mario la conduce a la hacienda Arismendi.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se aprovecha del conflicto existente entre Rosaura y Patricio para tensar aún más la situación con Rosaura, al amenazarla con revelarle a Patricio lo de su embarazo.

programme.title: Misión espacial

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus' fleet tries to avoid Charybdis, the first sea monster ready to swallow them, but Scylla, a horrible multi-headed creature, destroys three of his ships.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Sworn to defend humanity … Born with the cunning and superhuman power of a vampire, but able to stalk by day as well as night … Wesley Snipes stars in this action-packed thriller as the immortal vampire hunter Blade.

programme.title: Blade 2
programme.desc: The warrior Blade returns to fight a new race of super vampires hell-bent on annihilating all other vampires before destroying humanity. Blade aligns himself with a high-powered team to defeat an evil greater than either has ever battled.

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes returns to the war between the living and the undead in the final chapter. One man—part human, part vampire—battles the greatest vampire of all time, Dracula.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: Let Me In (2010)
programme.desc: Owen, an overlooked and bullied boy, finds love and revenge through Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz of KICK-ASS), a beautiful but peculiar girl who turns out to be a vampire.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: Less than 24 hours after being paroled, Danny Ocean handpicks a top-notch team of smooth operators to pocket $150 million in one night, in the most daring Las Vegas casino heist ever.

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: After splitting the $160 million take, each of the infamous Ocean's crew have tried to go straight, lay low and live a legit life…but that's proven to be a challenge.

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and the gang would have only one reason to pull off their riskiest casino heist — to defend one of their own. But they're going to need more than luck on their side to break “The Bank.”

programme.title: The Pelican Brief
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Julia Roberts and Denzel Washington star in this thriller about a young law student whose theory about the recent deaths of two Supreme Court justices embroils her in a web of greed, corruption and murder.

programme.title: The Purple Rose of Cairo
programme.desc: A comedy-fantasy about a Depression-era movie fan/waitress whose day-to-day existence is enlivened when her latest idol walks right off the screen and into her life!

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: The heat is on in this fast-paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friend's killer in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: A Father and Son initially enjoy their experiences, but a sudden snowstorm wreaks havoc and they are forced to spend a night in a cave without any supplies or food.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: When a Hollywood camera crew set out to film an active volcano they end up in a helicopter crash into the active volcano. All rescue attempts are delayed by lava, toxic gases and bad weather.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches & Zombies
programme.desc: A pregnant ER doctor is endangered by a seemingly invincible violent patient; an unexplained headache turns out to be life-threatening; a man with a fence post through his torso is brought into a busy ER in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twists & Turns
programme.desc: A violent convict may be faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan; a young man seems to be suffocating for no apparent reason; a father is stabbed in the heart trying to protect his son; a college cheerleader mysteriously goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dumpster Smash
programme.desc: A man who's been smashed by a dumpster barely clings to life; an elderly nun and an inebriated, screaming prostitute come into the ER at the same time; a woman dying of an apparent stroke may be suffering from a rare disease.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man bludgeons his neighbor to death, and flees when he becomes a suspect.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Love of karaoke leads police to a man who shot his wife while she slept.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Justin got hooked on prescription opiates after he was run over by a truck. After his mother died, Kayne turned to drugs to cope.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Musically gifted, intelligent and beautiful, everyone assumed Kaeleen was destined for great things.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Two women fight to bring a killer to justice in New York.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A Missouri town erupts in fear when a beloved wife and mom disappears.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A vivacious Army medic disappears after a night out near Fort Bragg, NC.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: A beautiful co-ed's murder ignites a search for a diabolical serial killer.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: The Battle of Britain is over. The Luftwaffe has been driven to exhaustion, and Germany suffers its first major defeat. Even though Britain remains undefeated, it is so isolated that Hitler has no concerns about turning his attention East.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: After the swift success at Smolensk, Hitler has diverted the bulk of Heinz Guderian's panzers down to the South, so as to capture the Ukrainian capital Kiev, considered more important than Moscow in Hitler's mind.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: Erich von Manstein's soldiers have trapped a massive Soviet force in Crimea, but the doomed troops have no intentions of surrendering, obeying Stalin's brutal 'Not A Step Back' order.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: October 1941, Germany's Army Group Center is only some 25 km west of Moscow. The Russian winter, however, is only a few weeks away. With not enough soldiers or military equipment, Soviet high command's only hope left is that the weather will save capital.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: From primitive balloons to spy planes. Get an insider's look at the pioneers of aerial reconnaissance and the impact they have had on modern warfare.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Russian Nuclear Secrets of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Discover the secret telegrams revealing how Stalin had a role in air battles with UN pilots, and how Britain unwillingly aided the communists.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: World War II in the East
programme.desc: The capture of Rzhev, the city that connects all railroads in Western Russia, is imperative. It will cost the lives of some 3 million Soviet soldiers and 500,000 German soldiers.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Enriqueta, aprovechándose de la admiración que la joven siente por ella, trata de abogar por Mauricio. Juana, poco dispuesta a discutir, anuncia que se retira de la compañía.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Carlota comienza su estrategia de reconquista, acariciando a Mauricio dormido en su regazo, cuando Juana abre repentinamente la puerta. Las mujeres confrontan sus miradas.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Marcela confronta a Daniel y lo amenaza el pedirle explicaciones sobre su comportamiento con Eva.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Eva y Adrián van a la fiesta de cumpleaños de Laurita, y Adrián le regala un perrito al que le ponen por nombre ‘Chico’.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Leonardo finge estar enfermo, como estrategia para que Eva lo atienda.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Tras la discusión con Eva, Alicia le pide trabajo a Marisol en donde ella trabaja, pero Marisol tiene sus razones para negarse a ayudarla.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: David está en casa de Rebecca y le dice que la ama mucho. Al cabo de un momento llega Armando y al ver a David se enoja, lo golpea dándole una paliza muy fuerte. Ramiro le dice a Mariela que se dirige a la ciudad.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Úrsula acusa a Ignacio de aprovecharse de su negocio para robar su dinero. No obstante, niega que ello sea verdad. Bajo amenaza de la señora, se ve obligado a devolver todo el dinero.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Virginia se reencuentra con su padre Alejandro Gómez después de años sin verlo. Por mucho que él quiera que olviden todo lo que sucedió, ella siente que tantos años no se pueden borrar con tanta facilidad.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Armando está decidido a vengarse por lo que David le hizo a su hermana. Por lo tanto, cuando lo encuentra en casa, le apunta con un arma, pero la llegada de Virginia impide una tragedia.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Carlota comienza su estrategia de reconquista, acariciando a Mauricio dormido en su regazo, cuando Juana abre repentinamente la puerta. Las mujeres confrontan sus miradas.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio se sorprende al escuchar llamar a su puerta, Desireé entra con prisa porque se siente perseguida. Ella acude a Mauricio con el corazón destrozado y lo abraza temblando, ruega por su protección y refugio.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Carlota pide ver a Desireé, quien reitera su amistad con ella. Desde que Juana descubrió que Mauricio es el padre de su hijo, no quiere volver a verlo. La viuda de Francisco balancea una sonrisa entre sus labios.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Amparo reclama a su hija hasta cuando planea continuar con su amnesia, siempre y cuando sea necesario, dice Carlota. A su vez, Carlota le pide a su madre que la ayude a hacer que Juana pierda a su hijo.

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files
programme.desc: Is this half man, half ape simply a figment of our collective imagination or does he really exist? As the evidence begins to pile up maybe we should be asking: who has been keeping this from us?

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files
programme.desc: The Great Deceiver. Seducer of the masses. The Bringer of Armageddon. Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files
programme.desc: We rely on machines for virtually every aspect of modern life. Have we reached the point where we need them more than they need us.

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files
programme.desc: Scientists believe that Stargates are doorways to wormholes in time. As it turns out, the government may have already known that.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team investigates multiple Sasquatch reports in California.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team investigates sightings of a Bigfoot-like creature in Arizona.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team investigates a very promising Sasquatch sighting in Michigan.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to New Mexico to investigate a possible Bigfoot sighting.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team ventures to Washington to track down a local Sasquatch.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: UAPs have only recently been witnessed entering the ocean at very high speeds. And since our oceans can be as much as six miles deep, is it possible that some of these UAPs were simply trying to get home?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: As the Fermi Paradox states, the possibilities that there is advanced life in the universe is surprisingly high. And if the universe is so old, why haven't we had any contact with extraterrestrial life?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: There is physical evidence of alien activity that has been hidden from the public for years. It is starting to be revealed.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: It is likely that aliens exist in a universe as large as ours. How would they navigate those vast distances and potentially visit us on earth?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: There are three types of close encounters, sightings, fleeting interactions, aliens taking humans for extended periods. We meet real people who have experienced alien life up close.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: From military radar to Navy aircraft, sightings of Unidentified Aerial Phenomena have become more frequent of late and been measured on ever more sophisticated technology. What could these visitors be after?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Several US presidents throughout history have described encounters with UAPs. Is there already an agreement in place between our world leaders and intelligent alien life? And if so, who is keeping that information from the public and why?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: In 1998 Astronauts captured images of a satellite in Earth's orbit. Is it the same alien object that Nicola Tesla detected in 1899, an alien probe known as the Black Knight?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Millions of years ago the Red Planet had a lot in common with Earth, but it's now a desert wasteland. Do the doorways recently discovered on the planet's surface lead to an existential lesson for our species?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: According to physics, time travel is possible. So could it be that UAPs aren't coming from somewhere else, but from some when else. Could these UAPs be us, from the future?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Certain structures on our planet have stood the test of time and continue to astonish mankind. So much so, that alien intervention in their construction thousands of years ago, has yet to be ruled out.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: In July of 2023, David Grusch, a former high ranking US Intelligence officer testified to a US government Oversight Committee that there are alien spacecraft located at secret facilities in the US.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Some places in the world, record more UAP sightings than the rest. So many so, in fact, that people flock from all over the world just for the chance to glimpse a flying saucer.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers
programme.desc: Senior citizens play pranks that include escaping from an ambulance, snagging groceries from other people's shopping carts, and falling asleep while operating an electric scooter.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers
programme.desc: Senior citizens play pranks that include a humourless waitress who runs out of everything, a man who reprimands people for walking too fast, and a mail carrier who tries to pass his responsibilities onto someone else.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers
programme.desc: Senior citizens play pranks that include nuns raising money in an unusual way, a man altering a shirt in a store, securing a car with tape, and partaking in someone else's meal in a restaurant.

programme.title: Betty White's Off Their Rockers

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and his crew are at deadly risk from an alien creature that feeds on the salt in a human body and can take on any form.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A strange alien substance causes the crew to act out their deepest inhibitions, while the ship plummets out of orbit.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A transporter malfunction causes Captain Kirk to split into his "good" and "evil" selves, and a landing party will freeze to death if the crew is unable to find a way to merge the two Kirks back together.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a intergalactic conman, Harry Mudd, and three incredibly beautiful women who harbor a dark secret.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Nurse Christine Chapel is reunited with her old fiancé on Exo III, but the scientist has plans for Captain Kirk and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk investigates an experimental facility for holding prisoners and finds a sinister scheme.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.
