programme.desc: Umma tries to find her missing wedding ring before Appa does. Jung crashes Janet's yoga class.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Only the Mehtas, Janet and Gerald know thus far that Raj cancelled his wedding with only the latter two knowing he did so because he is still in love with Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa is reluctant to have a house guest, but Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor. Jung accuses Janet of being coldhearted and Shannon tackles workplace bullying .

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: The twins' first birthday together leaves Tamera's best friend feeling left out, and Ray locked in an argument with Lisa over his parenting methods.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Fearing they'll be separated forever if Ray and Lisa marry other people, Tia and Tamera plot to derail Ray's new romance.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: When Lisa's disapproving mother comes for a visit, Ray agrees to pose as her husband.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: After their parents forbid them to attend a rap concert, the twins sneak out of the house to meet their idol anyway.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Tamera's glamorous new look gets her into a snobby clique -- but threatens her relationship with Tia, who's been snubbed by the same crowd.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bored with their jobs at Ray's limousine company, the twins secretly start working at a burger stand and quickly learn the perils of trying to be in two places at the same time.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) helps Richard (Malcolm Gets) confront unresolved issues with his jet-setting mother, Natalie (Elizabeth Ashley, “Evening Shade”), when she makes a surprise visit to New York.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) entrusts Annie(Amy Pietz) with various maid-of-honor duties, she learns that Annie’s strong suits aren’t dependability and punctuality and their frien2dship strains under the stress of preparing for Caroline’s wedding.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline is confused by nervous pangs and Del experiences panic attacks. Meanwhile, Richard decides to confess his love to Caroline as a last-ditch effort to stop her from marrying Del.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy tells Heloise about the magic of snow, she sees an opportunity to infuriate Lucius. --- Jimmy defends the adorable but evil Weavils when their habitat is threatened by Lucius’ construction plans.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lost in Clownburg, Jimmy finds himself hassled by a pack of ill-tempered rodeo clowns. --- When an emergency at Misery Inc. keeps Lucius from his date with Jez, he bribes Jimmy and Beezy to keep her occupied.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is fed up with Heloise and Beezy’s constant bickering, so he arranges a contest to see who can make nice. --- Jimmy has saved Lucius’ life, so Lucy must now scramble to endanger Jimmy’s life and return the favor.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jez wants Lucius to try a youthful new look, so Lucy tricks Jimmy into swapping hairstyles. --- When the ghost of pizza-crusts-past starts haunting Beezy, it’s up to Jimmy to make things right.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Tails builds a translation robot that inadvertently reveals the subtext of what everyone is saying. This leads to disagreements and fighting among Sonic and friends. / Sticks adopts a disgusting pet that annoys the rest of the gang.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman turns Amy, Sticks, Tails, and Knuckles into evil clones of himself. / Sonic and Tails save a village that's being plundered by bandits — and then find that they can't leave because the villagers guilt trips them into staying.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When a sentient computer virus takes over all of Dr. Eggman's technology, Orbot and Cubot must enter the cyber world to defeat it. / Dr. Eggman hires an intern who turns out to be a bit unstable.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Dr. Eggman discovers that “Modern Lair” Magazine wants to do a spread on his evil lair, he enlists Amy to help spruce up the place. / Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles accidentally awaken a sleeping rock giant, who begins rampaging.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After seeing a cross-eyed moose, Sticks is convinced that she and her friends are cursed. / When Dr. Eggman loses his confidence, he enlists the aid of Soar the Eagle, a motivational speaker and life coach.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Every time Sonic runs, his speed causes a deafening tone, so he's forced to give up his speed until a solution can be found. / Tails reprograms one of Eggman's robots and accidentally turns it into a killing machine.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: A meteor causes Sonic and Eggman to exchange bodies. / Orbot and Cubot wake up with no memory of the previous day's events and discover that Eggman is missing.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley gives Bar an answer, but past family drama may dampen their dream; a stressful move threatens to sour Jade's fresh start; Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After a covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. Jade wants to take things slow with Sean, but he has other ideas.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Ashley plans a surprise party for Bar. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. Kail helps Isaac find an interest that he likes.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail invites Devoin on her podcast. Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. Leah's twins turn 11.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous, and Briana tries to help her as the situation escalates. Ashley juggles even more when she finds out she has to suddenly move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. Leah plans a birthday party for Addie, hoping Jeremy can make it.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando with her instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. When Addie struggles with online learning, Leah makes a tough decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a hard decision about her family. Leah tries to balance Ali and Aleeah's unique needs. Kail juggles three different coparenting relationships. Bar starts college while Ashley plans a birthday surprise.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behavior wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Briana travels for surgery, but returns to something shocking. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about the lump on her breast.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her Associate's Degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road black. As Leah's second ultrasound approaches, she braces for the results.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces & threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumor. After meeting with a lawyer about Luis' parental rights, Briana is left with some hard choices.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Welcome to "Girls' Night In", where the cast of Teen Mom OG along with friends watch Teen Mom 2. In the premiere episode, Maci and Taylor sympathize with Briana's co-parenting struggles while Cheyenne roots for Bar as he prepares to propose to Ashley.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: All of the TMOGs are anxious to find out if Ashley said "yes" to Bar's proposal. Amber gets Leah's fear that pain medication will cause a relapse. Cate and Tyler feel for Jade's struggles with the pressures of moving, parenting and filming.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Cate and Tyler are delighted when Kail lets Isaac design his own room. Maci, Taylor and Raj dismiss the ring Sean gives Jade. Chey and her family enjoy meeting Briana's mysterious new boyfriend. Amber and Tonya worry about Leah's Covid exposure.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma tienen un encuentro apasionado y se citan fuera de la hacienda. Gabriela confía ciegamente en Fernando, le da dinero para una supuesta inversión con su amigo Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le pide a Sarita que atienda a su hermana Norma, al verla muy nerviosa. Franco se enfada cuando se entera de la boda apresurada de Jimena, ella encuentra la forma de calmarlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leandro sigue a Jimena y descubre quién es su enamorado, él se divierte cuando su prometida se molesta. La llegada de Ruth, la hija de Raquel, paraliza la celebración del compromiso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes están impresionados con Ruth por su parecido con Libia, ella se interesa por uno de ellos, Eva se acerca a pesar de las advertencias de Gabriela. Sara descubre a Norma con Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José chantajea a Sofía por el secreto de Paula y le pide dinero por su silencio. Él está dispuesto a intrigar a sus hermanos para enfrentarlos con Juan. Paula no puede controlar lo que siente por Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y terminan en la cama, pero él mantiene su intención de firmar el contrato del acuerdo por un año. Sofía es víctima del chantaje de José, que quiere alejar a su hermano de la mujer que desea.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar no esconde más su odio hacia Emilio del Monte, lo desprecia por el daño que hizo y le confiesa a Juan que, por rencor, lo dejó morir en el accidente. Él reacciona con violencia, en medio de la celebración en honor a la memoria de su padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar rechaza el dinero que le ofrece Gabriela para que se separe de su hija, ella acepta el consejo de Sara y arruina los planes de su yerno, Jimena pierde los beneficios de ser una Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le asegura a Fernando que se entregará a él como su esposa, él reacciona con soberbia. Jimena pregunta por Libia, a pesar de los esfuerzos de Juan por mantener ocultos sus recuerdos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acompaña a Gabriela para rescatar a Jimena, su madre se ofende al saber que ella trabaja en la panadería de Juan. Rosario renuncia al bar para irse de gira con otro representante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela ve a Norma y a Juan cuando se besan, ella le revela quién es el padre de su hijo, su madre cae desmayada, mientras Fernando escucha tras la puerta y sale armado de la hacienda.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl leads a mission team to scavenge the military base he discovered; Maggie tells her story, prompting a new mission for survival that only Negan can lead; Eugene and his group go through assessment by the Commonwealth's paramilitary police.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie's mission takes the team through a subway tunnel, challenged by lurking walkers and a recalcitrant Negan; with Eugene's group, Yumiko seeks answers about her brother and demands expedited processing into the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie's mission team gets separated and hunted by the Reapers; Carol, Rosita, Magna and Kelly attempt to catch horses for Alexandria; Judith, RJ, Hershel and Gracie cope with their parents going away.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Dog get captured by the Reapers; they are taken to the Meridian and reconnect with a familiar figure from their past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron, Carol, Lydia, and Jerry go to the Hilltop ruins for blacksmith tools and nearby game; Eugene's group goes through orientation at the Commonwealth; Maggie and Negan trudge through the woods; Judith and the kids clash with teenagers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Escaping from walkers, Connie and Virgil hide in a house occupied by mysterious creatures; Pope tests Daryl's loyalty to the Reapers with a conflicting mission; Kelly leaves Alexandria in search of Connie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie and Elijah learn a new survival tactic from Negan; Eugene's group clears walkers to pay their fines; Yumiko interviews for an upper-class job; Daryl learns more about Leah and the Reapers; Gabriel encounters a man of God.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan and Elijah battle the Reapers for food; Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo sale de la prisión para buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los que se quedan deben lidiar con las pérdidas recientes y preservar lo que quedó.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras llevan a cabo la misión de buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los integrantes del grupo se topan con múltiples obstáculos. La situación en la prisión empeora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Múltiples enemigos presionan a Rick y al grupo. ¿Será este finalmente el punto de quiebre de los sobrevivientes y de la prisión?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un rostro familiar regresa cuando cada uno de los miembros del grupo lucha por encontrar su propia humanidad en un mundo de peligro constante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo y horripilante capítulo se desarrolla en un campamento fuera de la prisión. ¿Podrán lograr la paz con la adición de nuevos integrantes?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Justo cuando la situación comenzaba a calmarse en la prisión, Rick y su grupo se enfrentan a peligro y destrucción inminentes. Esta vez podrían no ganar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras Rick se ocupa de viejas heridas, los miembros de la prisión tienen que adaptarse al nuevo entorno y preguntarse a sí mismos si la supervivencia por sí sola es suficiente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra muchos obstáculos tratando de encontrar estabilidad y seguridad, pero a veces lo único que los guía es la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Justo cuando Rick piensa que va a poder relajarse, se enfrenta a múltiples peligros inmediatos. Otros integrantes del grupo lidian con su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a la supervivencia diaria fuera del refugio, un simple pedido de uno de los integrantes del grupo conduce a una misión extraña pero instructiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo encuentra lo que podría ser un refugio ideal, otro grupo se da cuenta de que la mejor protección es la que brindan las personas que los acompañan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un lugar idílico para establecer un nuevo refugio, el grupo comienza a cuestionarse si es posible que las cosas vuelvan a ser como eran antes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aunque algunos sobrevivientes crean que deben ser brutales para mantenerse con vida, vemos que la fe a veces puede ser la herramienta de supervivencia más poderosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras múltiples caminos se entrechocan, Rick se enfrenta cara a cara con la brutalidad más absoluta. ¿Él y su grupo tendrán lo que hace falta para sobrevivir?

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An inspector checks the foundation as a perimeter drain is installed. The framing process begins. An architect explains her landscape plan to make the property look antique.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the plan for the living/dining room and the roof. After framing the house, the crew moves to the garage. Exterior trim arrives. Kevin learns how to attach the fascia board to the rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Erik lays shingles on the roof. Kevin learns colonial roof making. In Vermont, Kevin sees handcrafted light fixtures. Window installation begins. Norm heads to Maine to search for salvaged doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Drilling begins on a geothermal system. Norm visits first-period homes. Kevin tours a factory where the stairs and panels are built. On the North Shore, he learns of a new technology to seal ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps install clapboard siding. Roger selects salvaged granite. Richard discusses the insulation plan and sees how the geothermal pipes are connected. Kevin watches the cabinets come together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps fit the cabinets. Work starts on the driveway. Granite is used for a patio. The den gets wainscoting. The homeowners select interior paint colors. Erik installs the factory-made staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The staircase is finished. Richard shows the system for getting well water. A backup generator is installed. Kevin learns to fit a reproduction lantern. Kim turns a mud pit into a beautiful front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin builds a custom closet. Norm and Tommy see Kristina's designs. Richard shows Kevin the geothermal system. Kevin gets a tour of the second floor. The team celebrates another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Norm, Roger, Richard, and Tommy are back in Arlington—this time at an early English-style Arts and Crafts house built in 1909.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The design process kicks off. Old plaster walls are carefully demolished. Landscape plans and Roger begins removing the old Silver Maple. Kevin and Tommy bring down the exterior back wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a 100-year-old wooden beam with a new steel one. The tank gets removed by a specialist. The old concrete from the foundation gets transported to a recycling center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new concrete foundation is poured. Finding mature specimen trees for the yard. A precast concrete bulkhead is installed. The old rubble foundation gets waterproofed with synthetic rubber spray.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Steel beam fabrication and erection on the house. HVAC plans for the second floor. Front porch demoed with heavy machinery and new footings for a new porch. Working on the firebox and chimney.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Starting a new chimney. A 100-year-old brick factory. Designing the kitchen of the homeowner’s dreams. Tommy changes the pitch of the two back dormers to match the pitch of the new gable.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom range hood. The original chimney is demoed and Mark McCullough builds a new one. Family room, tile, and wood paneling design choices. A new slab floor is coated with a speckled epoxy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A hidden doorway is revealed. The new master bath presents a classic plumbing problem. Creating elaborate cuts with computerized machines. Scott Caron installs a ceiling fan. Arts and Crafts windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy builds the new Arts and Crafts front porch. Richard travels to the world’s largest underground quarry. Design and color selection. Mark McCullough shows Kevin the lost art of stucco.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An outdoor yoga shed. Installing a standing-seam copper roof. Trim a window using a PVC product. Richard installs a state-of-the-art boiler. Richard shows advanced, eco-friendly building techniques.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Removing a service pole at the front of the property. Building flared porch columns. A new brick patio. Kitchen cabinets are delivered and installed. Flashing decorative pieces on front gables.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingling the house. Figuring out window treatments. Radiant floor tubing is installed. Mark repairs the grand living-room fireplace. Tommy and Norm frame up the back deck coming out the side door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy assembles the roof. Kevin tries Lazure painting technique. Installing wood paneling in a corner of the living room and refinishing oak veneer. Roger plants screening trees that Emily selected.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Installing Shiplap. Laying the second set of steps for a walkway. Mauro Henrique reviews paneling. Marble slab is cut for the kitchen island. A cast stone mantel surrounds the new fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Final marble kitchen island installation. Laying giant stones for a fieldstone wall. How radiant floor heating and state of the art air conditioning works. Tommy and Kevin install a dog door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Arts and Crafts house in Arlington is near completion and the guys come to take a last look and celebrate with the homeowners. Roger Cook presents the homeowners with a special gift.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin introduces Detroit and describes some of its history. Kevin meets Frank and Tamiko Polk, the homeowners, and assess some of the repairs needed. Frank and Kevin start demo on the roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets Detroit’s Mayor about revitalizing neighborhoods. Rehabbed & Ready fixes homes in Grandmont Rosedale for families. Installing an alarm system. Blowing in new insulation from the roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard checks the plumbing stack at the Russell Woods project and Tommy investigates a leaky parapet. Kevin tours an automaker’s Dearborn estate while a tree threatens the Grandmont Rosedale project.

programme.desc: Jim is desperate to get Chrissy back in his life, and he starts taking big steps to show her he values her and is willing to change. After the success of the fashion show, the tension between Emily and Talia gets worse instead of better. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones
programme.desc: Chrissy knows she can't keep living in a hotel and that she's hurting Jim by keeping him at arm's length. It's time to choose: does she move back in with Jim, or find her own place and move on with her life? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: No Way It's Jose
programme.desc: An insecure Security guard, Andy Dick, greets, molests and offends our cast as they arrive for Season 5 of the Surreal Life.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Sunshine Strikers
programme.desc: Omarosa and Bronson start an all day tiff based on Bronson's belief that she is one of the fakest people he has ever met.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Take it off!
programme.desc: The Surreal Lifers learn that today they're putting on a burlesque show at a Hollywood Night-club!

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Backyard Makeover Surreal Edition
programme.desc: The cast heads off to a Battered Women's Shelter to build a new backyard.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Moto-Crossdressers
programme.desc: Jose appreciates the finer points of a bikini-clad Caprice and even offers advice on how she can improve her model-perfect body.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Vegas Dead Ringers
programme.desc: Today the cast learns they're taking an overnight trip to the City Of Sin!

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Voted Out of Vegas
programme.desc: For their second eventful day in swinging Las Vegas, the celebs participate in a SURVIVOR-style pool game called the “Vegas Castaway Challenge.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: The Knife Incident - Part 1
programme.desc: The Surreal Lifers learn that today is Press Day reporters and photographers from various media will be visiting the mansion for interviews and photo shoots.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: The Knife Incident - Part 2
programme.desc: As Omarosa packs to leave the house, Janice defends her actions, saying it was a joke and Omarosa is faking it again and trying to get camera time.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole Murphy, Andrea Kelly, Sheree Fletcher, Jessica Conseco, and Mayte Garcia are out to establish themselves as independent, successful women and bring relevance and honor to themselves separate from their very famous exes.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Despite warnings from her friends, Jessica seriously considers letting Jose move back in with her. Anxious to meet Mr. Right, Mayte resorts to a professional matchmaker, who urges her to de-Prince her home.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Just when Jessica thinks she might still be in love with Jose, she receives a bombshell from him. Meanwhile, Sheree and Terrell find themselves at odds over their long-distance marriage.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Anxious to escape the stress in their lives, the ladies head to Napa Valley for a weekend of fine food, fine wine, and (hopefully) fine men. On the trip, Jessica confronts Jose about his bad choices and gives him an ultimatum.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Royce' father raises concerns about his daughter's new boyfriend. Also, Evelyn checks out a fertility clinic as she prepares to begin a family with Chad Ochocinco. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jen's curiosity and suspicions are piqued when Eric wants to take a meeting with Suzie. Also, more than mallets are swinging when Tami and Meeka get into it at an upscale polo event. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: A trip to the Big Apple turns sour as Evelyn and Tami's beef over Ev's t-shirts resurfaces. Also, Jen agrees to her first date since splitting with Eric and Evelyn reconciles with her long-absent father. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling kicks off with the world champion The Beast, the biggest and the baddest phenom of wrestling, as she battles against the number one contender, New Jersey's own Adriana Gambino.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion The Beast puts her title on the line against the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's newest client, Mexican luchador sensation Tormenta!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW turns up the excitement with a six-way tag team featuring Fury, Mezmeriah & Razor – The Heavy Metal Sisters throwing down against the fearsome trio of Vivian Rivera, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a Triple Threat Main Event, WOW World Champion The Beast goes head-to-head-to-head with the Queen of Kings, Reina Del Rey and luchador extraordinaire Tormenta.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a battle against the odds, the Tonga Twins take on all three of the Heavy Metal Sisters – will the sisters be victorious or, despite being outnumbered, will the Tonga Twins win?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is serving up action-packed tag team action as the Fashionista Family Adrianna Gambino & Gigi Gianni face off against the fiery duo of Miami Sweet Heat, Laurie and Lindsey Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling when rap superstar BK Rhythm clashes with dancing queen Chantilly Chella! In tag team action we'll see if the light of Kandi Krush & Keta Rush can overcome the darkness of Siren The Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is ready to explode through your TV with a double dose of twin-tastic action, as the Tonga Twins lock up against the devilishly dangerous Miami Sweet Heat in the Tag Team Tournament Finals!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw take on The Tonga Twins and Miami's very own Sweet Heat in unbelievable Triple Threat Tag Team elimination action! BK Rhythm and Glitch the Gamer team up to take on the troubled team of Kandi Krush and Keta Rush!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tormenta & Wrecking Ball team up to take on Princess Aussie & Leia Makoa in can't miss tag team action! The Fabulous Lana Star accompanies Penelope Pink as she goes up against the formidable Jessie Jones!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kandi Krush learns who destroyed her beloved grandmother's boxing gloves and she wishes to settle the score – but David McLane has other ideas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has found a counter to Pegasus's mind-reading ability: Yugi switches back and forth between his two souls! Yugi is able to destroy Pegasus's Toon World, but the duel has just only begun. The next level of the deadly Shadow Game is about to start!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi crumples under the power of the Shadow Game. His friends yell desperate encouragement, but their voices cannot penetrate the sphere of darkness. Yugi's chance at victory is slipping away, as is his life!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus summons Relinquished, a fearsome monster that can consume Yugi's Duel Monsters! Yugi counters with… Kuriboh?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi meets a mysterious Egyptian named Shadi who enters Yugi's mind with the Millennium Key. What are these Millennium Items, and do they hold the answer to the mystery behind the Shadow Games?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends return from the Duelist Kingdom only to meet a young girl named Rebecca who demands that Grandpa return Blue-Eyes White Dragon to her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole the Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend the Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it's not the power of the cards, but the heart that's in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Duke Devlin defeats Joey and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey's freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.
